name: Risotto with Sundried Tomatoes, Pressure Cooker
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 to 4 cups vegetable stock or boullion
1/3 cup sun-dried tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and oil in the pressure cooker.
2. Sauté the onion until soft but not brown for about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the rice, ensuring it is thoroughly coated with the fat.
4. Add 3 1/2 cups of stock.
5. Lock the lid in place and bring to high pressure over high heat.
6. Maintain high pressure and cook for 6 minutes.
7. Reduce pressure using the quick release method.
8. Carefully remove the lid and taste the rice.
9. If needed, add a bit more stock as you stir until the rice is cooked through.
10. Cook over medium heat until any additional liquid is absorbed and the desired consistency is reached, about 1 minute or two.
11. Stir in the tomatoes and mozzarella, adding salt if desired.
12. Serve immediately.
